The tour was a standard tour. I would recommend you get feedback from everyone on the tour for what they expect or want to see. For example, I wanted to see the basketball courts and food court areas. The guide just pointed it out on our tour. It would be good to say, go in there and meet us here. And even cut out some of the buildings or portions of the tour if no one cares about them. We don't need to hear about a department or building if no one is interested. Would be better to go in and show things like the gaming center if people want to see. Maybe consider starting out in the Boathouse to show the space instead of the welcome center in the room. TBH we broke off from the tour to go see the things we cared about and then lost everyone until the end. Maybe even give a day pass to use the gym, play basketball/pickleball, or even get a free round of golf. Those are the things I enjoyed when seeing UNF. Seeing the buildings was nice but didn't get me excited to come to UNF.
